name: kevros-governance
description: Cryptographic policy enforcement for agent tool calls. Every action verified, every decision signed, every record hash-chained.

apiKey.description: Kevros API key. Auto-provisions free tier if not set.

agentId.description: Agent identifier for governance tracking. Defaults to hostname.

mode.description: Enforcement mode: enforce (fail-closed), advisory (log-only), deny (block all).

highRiskTools.description: Tool names that require governance verification before execution.

autoAttest.description: Automatically attest tool executions to build provenance history.
